originalAlarm.description: `__ops_6` could be null (null value originating from line 67) and is dereferenced in the call to `__irq_domain_add_2()`.

sanitizedDescription: `ops_6` could be null (null value originating from line 67) and is dereferenced in the call to `__irq_domain_add()`.
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_TWL4030_CORE () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_OF_IRQ () Bool
  false)
reasoning: ops = NULL at L19 when !CONFIG_OF_IRQ (assignment at L22 skipped). irq_domain_add(ops) at L25 passes NULL ops, which is then dereferenced at L12 (*ops). Known bug (// (4) ERROR at L12). PC = CONFIG_TWL4030_CORE AND !CONFIG_OF_IRQ correctly captures when ops remains NULL. No library macros.
